crisis_windows.label: TL Currency Crisis
crisis_windows.desc: TRY lost 45% vs USD in 2018 amid US sanctions, Erdogan's anti-rate-hike stance, and current account deficit.

crisis_windows.label: CBRT Rate Cut Shock
crisis_windows.desc: CBRT cut rates 500bp while inflation exceeded 80%, causing TRY collapse and ISE USD returns to crater despite nominal gains.

crisis_windows.label: Earthquake + Election Uncertainty
crisis_windows.desc: February 2023 earthquake (46,000 deaths, $34B damage) combined with May 2023 election uncertainty.

crisis_windows.label: Post-Election Orthodox Tightening
crisis_windows.desc: Return to orthodox monetary policy (rates raised to 50%) stabilises TRY but squeezes equity valuations.
